rules.name: Expo config error
rules.suggestion: Expo configuration error. Validate app.json/app.config.js syntax and required fields.

rules.name: EAS credentials issue
rules.suggestion: EAS authentication failed. Check that EXPO_TOKEN secret is set and valid in GitHub repo settings.

rules.name: Expo Router error
rules.suggestion: Expo Router navigation error. Check route file naming and directory structure under app/.
